steps.title: Identify the passage's central question
steps.content: The text explicitly poses: “What explains its rise in popularity?” This is the strongest signal of what the passage attempts to answer.

steps.title: Match the question to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B addresses why the pronoun became more widely used, directly answering the passage's stated question.

The other three each describe something not discussed: comparing other plural pronouns, historical timing, and geographic distribution.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
